'''Greg Somax''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] mathematics [[Teacher/Legends|instructor]] at the [[Imperial Naval Academy/Legends|Imperial Naval Academy]], and a [[Special Agent/Legends|Special Agent]] working for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. His position put him in contact with many Academy cadets, allowing him to come across likely candidates for Alliance recruitment. Somax never contacted potential recruits himself; the Alliance needed his services too much to allow him to risk losing his cover. Instead, he would inform a [[Recruitment Agent]], who would go on to make contact with the potential Rebel.<ref name="RASB" />
